original_statement: "Co-hosts Mexico are favourites to progress to the knockout stages, doing so in 87.2% of pre-tournament simulations [Group A teams: Mexico, South Africa, South Korea, Czechia; simulations as of early June 2026]."
statement_topic: FIFA World Cup 2026 - Group A qualification
statement_context: Excerpt from data-driven group stage preview published by The Analyst on 2026-06-03. Author Dan Edwards using Opta supercomputer methodology. Same outlet and author as existing gold_001 for consistency in model-based extraction patterns.
resolution_criteria: Mexico qualifies for the knockout stage from Group A in the 2026 FIFA World Cup, as determined by finishing in the top two positions or as one of the best third-placed teams according to the official FIFA group stage standings published after all group matches conclude on or before 2026-06-26.
source_text_snippet: Co-hosts Mexico are favourites to progress to the knockout stages, doing so in 87.2% of pre-tournament simulations.
